user.title: Alexa Device Builder
user.description:
Choose how Alexa Device Builder should operate.

For YAML package mode, configure where the Alexa filter package file will be written. The path is relative to your Home Assistant config directory.

Make sure your `configuration.yaml` includes the packages directory:
```yaml
homeassistant:
  packages: !include_dir_named packages
```

data_description.operation_mode: Select how Alexa Device Builder should work. Amazon account management setup is available in Phase 2; runtime actions are introduced in later phases.
data_description.package_path: Relative path within the config directory where the Alexa package YAML file will be written (e.g. packages/alexa_devices.yaml)

amazon.title: Amazon Account Management
amazon.description: Configure basic Amazon mode settings. Device-management runtime actions are introduced in later phases.

data_description.amazon_region: Amazon marketplace/region to use later for account-based device management.

filter.title: Alexa Device Filter
filter.description:
Select the entities and domains to expose to Alexa. Include rules take precedence over exclude rules.

Leave all lists empty to expose all entities.

data_description.locale: Locale used by Alexa for this smart home (e.g. de-DE, en-US). Leave empty to use the Alexa app default.
data_description.include_entities: Only these specific entities will be exposed to Alexa
data_description.include_domains: All entities in these domains will be exposed to Alexa
data_description.exclude_entities: These specific entities will not be exposed to Alexa
data_description.exclude_domains: All entities in these domains will not be exposed to Alexa

entity_names.title: Alexa Device Names
entity_names.description:
Optionally specify custom names for entities exposed to Alexa. Each line maps an entity ID to a name. Entities found via include entities/domains (including group members) are pre-filled with their current friendly name.

Example:
```yaml
light.living_room: Living Room Light
switch.tv: Television
```

Leave empty to use the default entity names.

data_description.entity_names: YAML mapping of entity_id to the custom name Alexa should use

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one instance of Alexa Device Builder can be configured.

error.invalid_yaml: Invalid YAML. Please check the format.
error.invalid_format: The value must be a YAML mapping of entity_id to name (e.g. light.living_room: My Light).
